ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "ident" TEXT /* Identifier for the airport (e.g., 00A, 00AA) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of airport (e.g., heliport, small_airport, closed) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the airport is located */,
  "iso_country" TEXT /* ISO country code for the airport */,
  "iso_region" TEXT /* ISO region code for the airport */,
  "municipality" TEXT /* Municipality where the airport is located */,
  "gps_code" TEXT /* GPS code for the airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport */,
  "local_code" TEXT /* Local code for the airport */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airport's official website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "runway_length_ft" INTEGER /* Length of the main runway in feet */,
  "runway_width_ft" INTEGER /* Width of the main runway in feet */,
  "runway_surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the main runway */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the airport record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the airport (e.g., operational, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_iso_country FOREIGN KEY ("iso_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES airport_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_iso_region FOREIGN KEY ("iso_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_continent FOREIGN KEY ("continent") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_municipality FOREIGN KEY ("municipality") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_gps_code FOREIGN KEY ("gps_code") REFERENCES gps_codes ("gps_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES iata_codes ("iata_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_coordinates FOREIGN KEY ("coordinates") REFERENCES coordinates ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_local_code FOREIGN KEY ("local_code") REFERENCES local_codes ("local_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the airport type */,
  "min_elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Minimum elevation for the airport type */,
  "max_elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Maximum elevation for the airport type */,
  "max_runway_length_ft" INTEGER /* Maximum runway length for the airport type */,
  "min_runway_length_ft" INTEGER /* Minimum runway length for the airport type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the continent */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the continent */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the municipality */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the municipality */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_codes" (
  "gps_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS code */,
  "gps_code" TEXT /* GPS code for the airport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GPS code */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the GPS code is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iata_codes" (
  "iata_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IATA code */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IATA code */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the IATA code is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iata_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_codes" (
  "local_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local code */,
  "local_code" TEXT /* Local code for the airport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the local code */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the local code is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coordinate */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the coordinate in feet */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the coordinate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the airports table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the airport record */,
  "changes" TEXT /* JSON object describing the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_versions_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)
